targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and (r._field == "signaling_to_connection_seconds" or r._field == "connection_to_wg_handshake_seconds"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> group(columns: ["connection_type"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
